description: Controller undo during movement-phase reinforcement placement. Regression for the reported bug: with the virtual cursor active (its normal state while placing), pressing X did nothing because VirtualCursor swallowed it as a synthetic right-click. Now X undoes the last placed model regardless of cursor state, and B undoes the ENTIRE unit and BACKS OUT to the unit list — the reserve unit returns to Reserves (status 7) and re-appears under REINFORCEMENTS, so the player can pick another unit or end the phase instead of being re-dropped into placement. Models are staged via the controller's own try_place_at (the same call a cursor A-click makes); the undo itself is driven by REAL joypad button events (X=2, B=1) through the live input pipeline.

steps.script:
var m = tree.current_scene
var list = m.unit_list
for i in range(list.item_count):
	if str(list.get_item_metadata(i)) == "U_BOYZ_F":
		list.select(i)
		list.item_selected.emit(i)
		return true
return false
